description: Cognito app client for the Customer App (TerraAI). Uses the same opusaimobility-users pool as the rider client but with a separate client ID for analytics separation.

notes.userPool: Uses the same 'opusaimobility-users' Cognito User Pool as the existing 'opusaimobility-rider-client' (Rider app). The pool is defined in /aws/cognito-pool.json.
notes.clientIdSeparation: A separate client ID enables per-app analytics, token management, and independent OAuth callback URL configuration without affecting the Rider app.
notes.authFlows: Matches the Rider client: USER_SRP_AUTH for secure password-based auth, REFRESH_TOKEN for session continuity, USER_PASSWORD_AUTH for migration trigger compatibility, CUSTOM_AUTH for future MFA/challenge flows.
notes.oauthScopes: Full set of standard scopes plus admin scope for Cognito user operations, matching Rider client configuration.
notes.crossAppAuth: Because both clients share the same user pool, a user registered through either app can authenticate via either client with the same credentials (Requirement 7.1, 7.2).
